name: Deadly Zombie Virus
description: Deadly Zombie Virus is an action-packed top-down zombie survival shooter. Choose from unique characters like Soldier, Ninja, Mage, and more. Fight through intense waves of zombies, mutant bosses, and elite enemies across 3 different maps: Forest, City, and House. Upgrade your weapons, unlock powerful abilities, use special attacks and ultimates to survive. Features include day/night cycle, rewarded ads for revives and bonus coins, cloud save system, and full mobile touch controls. Can you survive the deadly zombie virus?
instructions: Desktop WASD to move Mouse to aim and shoot Right-click for special attack Space for dash Q for ultimate ability E to interact ESC to pause Mobile On-screen joystick to move auto-aim with fire button touch buttons for special dash and ultimat
